name: memory-mcp-dashboard
description: A cyberpunk-themed web dashboard for browsing and inspecting the memory store that powers @aalokjha/mem-aj — semantic search, neural graph visualization, same storage backends.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w web
scripts.clean: rm -rf server/dist web/dist && find . -name node_modules -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' +

author: Aalok Jha <aalokaj59@gmail.com>
